features: 【 Elegant 40th Birthday Celebration】Celebrate in style with our black & gold 40th birthday banner decoration, perfect for honoring 40 wonderful years. Ideal for both men and women born in 1986, this premium decoration adds glamour to any milestone party

【 Large & Premium Quality】This 40th birthday party supply measures 180x110cm (70.8"x43.3") and is made from durable 100D polyester. It features vibrant, fade-resistant printing that showcases iconic 1986 UK pop culture references for lasting memories

【 Nostalgic 1986 UK Timeline】Relive special memories with printed highlights of 1986 - hit songs, blockbuster films, UK landmarks, sports events and fascinating facts about prices and population trends. Make this born in 1986 UK birthday background banner a perfect conversation starter at parties

【 Quick & Secure Setup】This 40th birthday decoration features four reinforced corner holes and includes hanging ropes for easy installation. You can effortlessly attach it to walls, fences, or photo booths to instantly transform your party space. The lightweight and machine washable fabric folds neatly for compact storage, making it perfect for repeated use at future celebrations

【 Versatile Vintage Decor】Perfect as a photo backdrop, wall decor or cake table display. Complements all 40th birthday party themes and pairs beautifully with balloons and streamers. Beyond birthdays, this born in 1986 UK backdrop sign in poster ideal for anniversaries, family gathering, class reunions and retro-themed parties
